expectations.evidence: Lines 9-11: Explicitly checks AWP Wallet skill is installed, provides skill URL, and checks wallet is unlocked via 'awp-wallet status' and 'awp-wallet unlock'
Line 64: Spender is explicitly 'StakeNFT' for the deposit approve step. Line 213 also reiterates 'Deposit 的 approve 给 StakeNFT（不是 RootNet）'
Line 80: '等待 Approve 交易收据确认后，再进行下一步。' (Wait for Approve transaction receipt confirmation before proceeding)
Lines 58-68 (approve), 84-94 (deposit), 148-159 (allocate): Each transaction shows detailed confirmation dialog and asks '是否确认执行?' before executing
Lines 90-91, 101: deposit called with amount '10000000000000000000000' wei (10000×10^18) and lockEpochs '26'
Lines 146-166: After deposit, calls RootNet.allocate with agent address and subnetId '3' with 10000 AWP in wei
Line 112: 'lockEndEpoch — 锁定结束的绝对 epoch 号（注意：这是绝对值，不是输入的相对 lockEpochs=26）'. Also reiterated at line 214.
